prompt: Repair arch.yaml to describe the requested weight-stationary accelerator. Keep the existing hierarchy and names. DRAM must be 64 bits wide with 16-bit data words. shared_glb must have depth 16384, 32 banks, and read/write bandwidth 16. PE must be a 16 by 16 spatial mesh. pe_spad must have depth 192, keep Weights, and bypass Inputs and Outputs. mac must use an 8-bit multiplier and 16-bit adder. Replace all null placeholders with these values and leave the file as valid YAML.
instruction: Complete the Timeloop-style architecture description in arch.yaml.
